primaryCitation: W. Va. Code §18-5-13 (statute silent on term/renewal/bidding for student transportation contracts; delegates to county-board rules and requires only insurance coverage in 'Any contractual agreement for transportation of students'); WV BOE Policy 8200 (W. Va. C.S.R. §126-202) §§3.2.5.b (Life of Contract), 3.2.5.c (Renewals), 7.11 (Competitive Bid Threshold Limits)
note: W. Va. Code §18-5-13 confirmed: county boards 'Provide transportation according to rules established by the county board' and 'Any contractual agreement for transportation of students shall require the vehicle owner to maintain insurance coverage' — statute silent on term, renewal, and bidding. Policy 8200 §3.2.5.b verbatim: 'Contracts normally cover a 12-month period... A solicitation for a contract that includes an option on the part of the LEA to extend or renew the contract for an additional period may be advantageous and may be considered.' §3.2.5.c verbatim: 'Renewals shall be in accordance with the terms and conditions of the original contract and are limited to two successive one year periods.' §7.11 thresholds confirmed at $5K/$10K/$25K/$50K tiers.
